articles.title: William H. Macy on Jim Carrey’s rumoured ‘tough’ behaviour on set
articles.description: Veteran actor William H. Macy recently shared his thoughts on difficult co-stars, expressing frustration with actors who make sets 'miserable' for others without consequence. While not directly naming names, Macy commented on rumors surrounding Jim Carrey's alleged tough on-set behavior, noting he's 'heard he can be really tough.' This echoes past criticism from Martin Freeman regarding Carrey's method acting.

articles.title: Savannah Guthrie breaking down between commercial breaks at ‘Today’ show amid search for Nancy, ‘She’s gotten emotional’
articles.description: Savannah Guthrie has been tearing up off-camera at the ‘Today’ show amid the search for her missing mother Nancy Guthrie.

articles.title: 'Oru Durooha Saahacharyathil' OTT release
articles.description: Kunchacko Boban's film 'Oru Durooha Saahacharyathil', directed by Ratheesh Balakrishnan Poduval, is now heading for digital streaming on May 13, 2026. Despite high expectations, the movie, set in Wayanad, did not achieve significant box office success. Critics noted a jarring tonal shift in the second half and a predictable climax, though the thematic foundation was strong.

articles.title: Love Horoscope Today, May 12, 2026
articles.description: Daily Love Horoscope for May 12 2026 highlights mixed romantic prospects for all zodiac signs, urging caution, optimism, patience, and awareness in relationships.

articles.title: 'Madhuvidhu' OTT release: When and where to stream Sharafudheen and Kalyani Panicker's romantic family drama
articles.description: Sharafudheen stars as Amruth Raj in 'Madhuvidhu,' a film about a newly married man and the ensuing chaos in his traditional household. Kalyani Panicker debuts as the female lead. The movie, exploring marital dreams and unexpected turns, begins streaming on Sony LIV on May 22. ETimes rated it 2.5/5, noting its descent into avoidable drama.

articles.title: American Idol voting number: How to vote by text for Hannah Harper, Jordan McCullough, and Keyla Richardson?
articles.description: Voting has begun for the American Idol Season 24 finale. Fans can vote for the finalists via text, the American Idol app, or the ABC website.

articles.title: Ranveer to play Lord Shiva in 'The Immortals of Meluha' adaptation
articles.description: Ranveer Singh is reportedly set to embody Lord Shiva in a grand cinematic trilogy based on Amish Tripathi's 'The Immortals of Meluha'. Singh's production banner has acquired the rights for this ambitious project, envisioned as a mythological universe. Screenplay and world-building are underway, with filming for the first installment slated for 2028, following Singh's current film commitments.

articles.title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection day 54: Ranveer Singh’s film finally crosses the Rs 1795 cr mark amid OTT release buzz
articles.description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' is nearing its two-month box office run and is set for an OTT debut on May 14. The spy drama has achieved a worldwide gross collection of Rs 1,795.10 crore, with India's net collection reaching Rs 1,143.44 crore.

articles.title: Taylor Swift reportedly has six wedding dresses ready for Travis Kelce ceremony amid secrecy claims
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s rumoured wedding plans are making headlines after reports claimed the singer has six wedding dresses prepared for the ceremony. Insiders say some gowns may serve as decoys to prevent leaks and protect the final bridal reveal. The couple is also reportedly planning a London celebration following a possible New York wedding. While no official details have been confirmed, the secrecy surrounding Swift and Kelce’s plans continues fueling intense fan curiosity online.

articles.title: Lizlaz: ‘People offered me money to throw shade at Virat Kohli’
articles.description: German influencer Lizlaz has finally broken her silence on the viral controversy involving cricketer Virat Kohli allegedly liking one of her Instagram pictures. In a recent interaction, the influencer described the entire experience as “unreal” and also made a startling revelation during the conversation, claiming that some journalists allegedly offered her money to make negative statements about the cricketer.

articles.title: "Money will NEVER buy class": Brittany Mahomes slammed as fans say Patrick Mahomes’ fame “changed her completely”
articles.description: Brittany Mahomes is facing fresh online backlash after a recent social media post triggered accusations of entitlement and arrogance from critics. Reddit users quickly revived past controversies involving Patrick Mahomes’ wife, including her champagne-spraying incident and previous Instagram remarks defending the Chiefs quarterback. While some fans believe the criticism toward Brittany has become excessive, others argue her online behaviour continues to fuel negative reactions. The debate has once again highlighted her divisive reputation among NFL fans and social media users.

articles.title: Are the Royals invited to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding? Prince William and Beatrice connection fuel fresh speculation
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce sparked fresh royal wedding speculation after attending Poppy Delevingne’s London birthday party alongside Princess Beatrice and Princess Eugenie. The appearance renewed interest in Swift’s growing connection to Britain’s royal circle, especially after Prince William attended her Eras Tour in 2024. While rumours continue about possible royal wedding guests, no official details or confirmed invitations have emerged. Fans, however, remain convinced Swift and Kelce’s London social life hints at deeper royal ties.

articles.title: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac surprises followers after rare family photo with mum creates massive reaction across social media
articles.description: Paige Spiranac shared a rare Mother’s Day photo with her mother on X, and fans quickly reacted to their strong resemblance. Many followers called the pair “twins” in the comments. The golf influencer continues growing her brand through golf media, entertainment, and public appearances, including Happy Gilmore 2 and the Truist Championship alongside Seth Curry.

articles.title: Trump Appears To DOZE OFF Moments After Telling Sen. Katie Britt ‘Don’t Speak Too Long’
articles.description: President Donald Trump is facing fresh online scrutiny after viral clips appeared to show him struggling to stay awake during a White House maternal healthcare event on Monday. The moment came shortly after Trump warned Senator Katie Britt not to “speak too long” because generals were waiting to brief him on Iran. Critics, including political commentator Harry Sisson and California Governor Gavin Newsom, mocked the president online as questions surrounding Trump’s cognitive health and stamina once again exploded across social media.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s visit to London might hold a deeper meaning ahead of their lavish wedding
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have been pretty busy planning their future together as billions around the world wait for the two to finally tie the knot, after dating for close to three years. The billionaire pop star Taylor Swift and the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce, recently turned heads in London and it seems, there was a deeper reason behind their surprise visit.

articles.title: “You should always be kind”: Megan Thee Stallion gets emotional about family after Klay Thompson drama
articles.description: Klay Thompson, the four time NBA champion, and Megan Thee Stallion had inspired billions around the world with their love until the popular artist accused him of cheating on her multiple times, a year into their relationship. While their high profile break up has sparked shockwaves across the world, Megan Thee Stallion has opened up about her family.

articles.description: In 2026, NBC will not renew multiple shows, including Law & Order: Organized Crime and Brilliant Minds, as part of a strategy shift.

articles.title: Babil Khan Forays Into Malayalam Cinema With Gandhi Bazar Sunday Market
articles.description: Babil Khan is leaping in his career. The young actor has signed his first Malayalam film, which will be directed by Babu Janardhanan. Titled Gandhi Bazar Sunday Market, the upcoming movie also stars Aparna Balamurali.

articles.title: Employee gets terminated for refusing to lower his salary. Later teaches the boss a lesson about office pressure tactics
articles.description: A Reddit post by an IT developer from Milan has gone viral after he claimed he was fired shortly after refusing to accept a salary reduction despite having a signed contract. The employee said tensions at work increased after he rejected the pay cut request, followed by closer monitoring and criticism of his performance. He was later terminated for “bad performance,” which he believes was linked to the earlier dispute.

articles.title: Aishwarya snubbed from L'Oreal Cannes campaign leaves fans upset
articles.description: India’s association with the Cannes Film Festival has, for years, come with one constant visual — Aishwarya Rai Bachchan walking the red carpet for L'Oreal Paris. However, ahead of this year’s edition of the festival, fans were left confused and disappointed after the actress was noticeably absent from the brand’s latest promotional campaign. Alia, who recently joined L'Oreal Paris as a global ambassador, was prominently featured in the campaign video.

articles.description: Perfect Crown actress Lee Yeon recently revealed on The Manager that her driver’s license was revoked after she missed the renewal deadline. She also surprised viewers by admitting that her driving scenes in the drama were completed using CGI because she no longer drives.

The action-packed courtroom drama mixed with supernatural elements has triggered huge buzz ahead of release. articles.title: ‘Class’ fame Anjali Sivaraman bags lead role in Mira Nair’s international film ‘AMRI’
articles.description: Mira Nair's ambitious biopic 'AMRI' has found its Amrita Sher-Gil in Anjali Sivaraman, chosen for her striking resemblance and emotional depth. After a global search, Sivaraman, known for 'Class', will portray the legendary artist's life from Paris to India. The film, also featuring Jim Sarbh and Emily Mortimer, is currently filming in Budapest.

articles.title: Bhumi Pednekar to portray a lawyer in Arif Sheikh’s upcoming father-daughter courtroom drama
articles.description: Bhumi Pednekar is set to star in an untitled courtroom drama, portraying a lawyer. This role follows a nine-month hiatus taken after intense online trolling, during which she reassessed her career choices.

articles.title: ‘Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabi Bahu Thi 2’ May 10 written update: Mihir leaves for the US while Tulsi worries about Rio
articles.description: Rio's suspicions about Karan and Nandini grow, worrying Tulsi. Mihir plans to bring Rio home, but Karan fears it will expose Nandini. Meanwhile, Ajay defends Pari after she saves Sunny, despite Indrani's accusations. Mihir departs for a case, promising Tulsi a honeymoon upon his return, as their legal battle begins.

articles.title: 'Was starstruck, SRK was there': Palak recalls meeting Deepika
articles.description: Palak Tiwari revealed her deep admiration for Deepika Padukone, calling her 'just perfect.' She recounted a childhood encounter where she was left speechless meeting Deepika on the sets of 'Comedy Nights with Kapil,' even with Shah Rukh Khan present. Tiwari also discussed her unique path in Bollywood, emphasizing her desire to forge her own identity independent of comparisons. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.description: Babil Khan is set to make his Malayalam cinema debut with Babu Janardhanan’s upcoming film Gandhi Bazar Sunday Market. The actor will star alongside Aparna Balamurali and an ensemble cast in the much-awaited project.

articles.description: The trailer for Suriya's upcoming film 'Karuppu' has been released. It showcases the actor in an intense, action-packed role, fighting for justice in a courtroom drama alongside Trisha Krishnan. The film is set for a May 14 theatrical release.

articles.title: 'My Royal Nemesis' review: Lim Ji-yeon and Heo Nam-jun's chaotic time-travel rom-com is total fun
